[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@empathyco/x-components](./x-components.md) &gt; [ResultsList](./x-components.resultslist.md)

## ResultsList class

It renders a [ItemsList](./x-components.itemslist.md) list with the results from [SearchState.results](./x-components.searchstate.results.md) by default.

The component provides a default slot which wraps the whole component with the `results` bound.

It also provides the slot result to customize the item, which is within the default slot, with the result bound.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class ResultsList extends Vue implements InfiniteScroll 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

<b>Implements:</b> [InfiniteScroll](./x-components.infinitescroll.md)

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation](./x-components.resultslist.animation.md) |  | Vue \| string | Animation component that will be used to animate the results. |
|  [items](./x-components.resultslist.items.md) |  | Result\[\] | The results to render from the state. |
